  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api

Uses of Package
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api

Packages that use com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous
Continuous-space EDA and NES/CMA-style drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.discrete
Discrete and binary EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.dynamic
Dynamic/noisy optimization EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.mo
Multi-objective EDA drivers and skeletons.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation
Permutation-focused EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.dynamic
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.mo
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.tree
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.tree
Tree/grammar-oriented algorithm drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.events
Event bus, run events and sink contracts used for observability and persistence.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.metrics
Core metric collectors and latent-knowledge analyzers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.plugins
Plugin metadata and dependency contracts.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.experiments.factory
Factories that assemble runtime components from config/plugins.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.experiments.runner
Experiment and batch orchestration entry points.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous
Continuous benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto
Boolean-function and cryptography optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete
Discrete benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar
Grammar-based symbolic regression/classification problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.multiobjective
Multi-objective benchmark suites.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.permutation
Permutation benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.tree
Structured tree benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
    Class
    Description
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm
    Template-method base implementation for model-based algorithms.
    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.
    AlgorithmContext
    Immutable runtime context passed to algorithms.
    Population
    Mutable population aggregate with helper methods used by algorithms and metrics.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous
    Class
    Description
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm
    Template-method base implementation for model-based algorithms.
    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.

    Template-method base implementation for model-based algorithms.
    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.
    AlgorithmContext
    Immutable runtime context passed to algorithms.
    Fitness
    Common contract for scalar and vector fitness representations.
    Population
    Mutable population aggregate with helper methods used by algorithms and metrics.

    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.tree
    Class
    Description
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm
    Template-method base implementation for model-based algorithms.
    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
    Class
    Description
    Algorithm
    Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.
    AlgorithmContext
    Immutable runtime context passed to algorithms.
    AlgorithmContext.Builder
    Builder to keep algorithm setup explicit and readable.
    AlgorithmState
    Immutable snapshot of algorithm state used by stopping, restart, and metrics hooks.
    ConstraintHandling
    Strategy for handling infeasible sampled genotypes.
    Fitness
    Common contract for scalar and vector fitness representations.
    Individual
    Strongly typed individual entity carrying genotype and fitness.
    LatentTelemetry
    Structured latent-knowledge payload emitted per iteration.
    LocalSearch
    Optional local-search hook for memetic EDA variants.
    MetricCollector
    Hook for collecting iteration metrics and diagnostics.
    Model
    Probabilistic model contract used by EDA-style algorithms.
    ModelDiagnostics
    Structured model diagnostics captured per iteration and persisted by sinks.
    NichingPolicy
    Policy for diversity preservation and niche formation.
    ObjectiveSense
    Defines whether the optimization objective is a minimization or maximization problem.
    Population
    Mutable population aggregate with helper methods used by algorithms and metrics.
    Problem
    Optimization problem contract.
    ReplacementPolicy
    Strategy for producing next generation from current population and offspring.
    Representation
    Domain-specific genotype representation.
    RestartPolicy
    Policy controlling run restarts when stagnation or degeneracy is detected.
    RunResult
    End-of-run summary used by CLI output, persistence, and reports.
    SelectionPolicy
    Strategy for selecting individuals used for model fitting or parent selection.
    StoppingCondition
    Defines when an algorithm run should stop.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults
    Class
    Description
    AlgorithmState
    Immutable snapshot of algorithm state used by stopping, restart, and metrics hooks.
    ConstraintHandling
    Strategy for handling infeasible sampled genotypes.
    Individual
    Strongly typed individual entity carrying genotype and fitness.
    LocalSearch
    Optional local-search hook for memetic EDA variants.
    NichingPolicy
    Policy for diversity preservation and niche formation.
    ObjectiveSense
    Defines whether the optimization objective is a minimization or maximization problem.
    Population
    Mutable population aggregate with helper methods used by algorithms and metrics.
    Problem
    Optimization problem contract.
    ReplacementPolicy
    Strategy for producing next generation from current population and offspring.
    Representation
    Domain-specific genotype representation.
    RestartPolicy
    Policy controlling run restarts when stagnation or degeneracy is detected.
    SelectionPolicy
    Strategy for selecting individuals used for model fitting or parent selection.
    StoppingCondition
    Defines when an algorithm run should stop.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.events
    Class
    Description
    AdaptiveActionRecord
    One adaptive action triggered by latent-knowledge signals.
    LatentTelemetry
    Structured latent-knowledge payload emitted per iteration.
    ModelDiagnostics
    Structured model diagnostics captured per iteration and persisted by sinks.
